title: Country column for automations
excerpt: We are using the CRM and we have some distributors on several countries. I would like when a country of the account is filled the state of the type of customer changes accordingly. For example if it is from Spain, change…

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using the CRM and we have some distributors on several countries. I would like when a country of the account is filled the state of the type of customer changes accordingly. For example if it is from Spain, change it to “Distributor customer” or if it is from Argentina change it to “Direct customer”.
